overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City during golden hour. The player navigates a busy futuristic downtown street with neon signs, holographic billboards, and towering cyberpunk architecture, crossing intersections and passing various pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown sidewalk with neon corporate signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward a large intersection, observing the neon-lit buildings and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: tall dark building with prominent purple neon 'DATA INC' signage and multiple holographic displays
massive futuristic arch and elevated highway structure spanning across the street ahead
large vertical holographic advertisement showing a woman in white dress with red heart logo
reflective wet pavement surface showing reflections of neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk during golden hour, with the DATA INC building dominating the left side with its purple neon signage. The camera walks steadily forward toward a massive elevated monorail structure in the distance, while holographic billboards glow on the right. The wet pavement reflects the warm sunset light mixed with cool neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk entering the wide intersection
futuristic red sports car and other vehicles pass through the intersection while crossing
turns left while crossing to face the DATA INC building directly, then continues toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating across the multi-lane intersection while avoiding pedestrians and observing the passing traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving through the intersection from left to right
pedestrian in white jacket and dark pants crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the dark asphalt road
tall red metal structure with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
vent on the left side emitting white steam or smoke

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide sunlit intersection as the camera steps onto the crosswalk. Futuristic vehicles including a red sports car pass by while the camera turns left to face the DATA INC building directly. Steam rises from a vent on the left as pedestrians cross alongside, and the massive elevated highway structure looms closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with food vendors and storefronts

events.description: completes crossing and steps onto the opposite sidewalk, passing a yellow vehicle
passes the Burrito XXL food stand on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk passing various pedestrians and observing the street vendors and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: red and yellow food vendor stall with 'BURRITO XXL' and 'IT'S BIG' signage
various commercial storefronts with neon signs and advertisements at street level

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues along a busy sidewalk lined with storefronts. The DATA INC building recedes into the distance on the left while a colorful Burrito XXL food stand appears on the right. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction as the camera moves deeper into the downtown area, with the elevated monorail structure still visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street approaching the elevated highway structure

events.description: continues walking straight as the street becomes slightly less crowded

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the massive elevated monorail structure visible in the distance

entered.detail: metal railing along the right edge of the sidewalk separating pedestrian walkway from the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera continuing down the sidewalk as the DATA INC building fades into the distance and the Burrito stand is passed. The elevated monorail structure grows larger as the camera approaches it. The street becomes slightly less crowded with pedestrians, and the warm golden hour light continues to illuminate the futuristic architecture ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a futuristic downtown district that transitions from a neon-lit sidewalk into a wide, sun-drenched intersection and back into a bustling commercial corridor. It begins beside the purple neon signage of the DATA INC building, moving steadily forward over wet pavement that reflects a blend of warm sunset light and cool holographic glows. As the camera steps into a wide intersection, the view opens to reveal passing futuristic vehicles and rising steam from street vents before turning to face the towering architecture of the DATA INC building. The scene then shifts back to a crowded sidewalk where the building recedes in the distance and a colorful Burrito XXL food stand appears on the right. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the city as the pedestrian crowd thins, drawing closer to a massive elevated monorail structure under the persistent golden hour light.
